tools.name: tcpdump
tools.description: Capture and analyze network traffic using tcpdump. Automatically terminates after timeout_seconds (default 60). You can also pass '-c <count>' to limit by packet count.

tools.name: tshark
tools.description: Capture and analyze network traffic using tshark (Wireshark CLI). Automatically terminates after timeout_seconds (default 60). You can also pass '-c <count>' to limit by packet count.

tools.name: netdiscover
tools.description: Active/passive ARP reconnaissance tool to discover hosts on a network. Automatically terminates after 60 seconds to prevent hanging.

tools.name: arp_scan
tools.description: Send ARP packets to local network to discover alive hosts. CRITICAL: Ensure you specify a strict target like '-l' (local network) or a specific CIDR so it terminates quickly without hanging.

tools.name: nmap
tools.description: Network exploration tool and security / port scanner. CRITICAL: For broad or blind scans, you MUST use fast flags (e.g., '-F', '-T4') or strict timeouts (e.g., '--host-timeout 5m') to avoid the command taking too long and freezing the session.

tools.name: arpspoof
tools.description: Intercept traffic on a switched LAN by forging ARP replies. Automatically runs for 60 seconds before terminating.

tools.name: ettercap
tools.description: Comprehensive suite for man-in-the-middle attacks on LAN. Automatically runs in Text-only mode (-T) and terminates after 60 seconds.
